rulings.Case Title: GLORIA YEE VS. FAT NOODLE 2ND SF, LLC, ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of And Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement Pursuant To C.C.P Section 877.6
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday December 17, 2018 line 1. DEFENDANT MR. PAVERS CONTRACTORS SERVICE, INC. Notice Of And Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement Pursuant To C.C.P Section 877.6 GRANTED. Moving party met all Tech-Built factors. Opposing party failed to show that the settlement is not within the ballpark of Mr. Pavers' liability. The determination of good faith settlement is made at the time of the settlement. At that time there was no cause of action for contractual indemnity alleged. Even if such cause of action were alleged, Defendants failed to show that the valuation of the indemnity would have changed the "ballpark," i.e. there is no authority and no argument presented showing that Mr. Pavers, due to indemnity clause, would have to indemnify the Defendants for all damages claims by the Plaintiff, including, for example, unpaid rent. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GLORIA YEE VS. FAT NOODLE 2ND SF, LLC, ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday December 17, 2018 line 1. INTERVENOR LEE WEINBERG, UNITED STATES LIABILITY INSURANCE COMPANY Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Cross-Complaint moot to the extent it seeks an amendment re: Mr. Pavers in light of the ruling on the motion for good faith settlement, barring indemnity claims. Motion is continued to January 14, 2019 to be heard with other pending motion for leave to amend. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: STEVE WANG ET AL VS. CITADEL RE & INVESTMENTS LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Demand For Production Of Documents And Interrogatories
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday December 17, 2018 line 2. PLAINTIFF STEVE WANG, JENNY YU Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Demand For Production Of Documents And Interrogatories OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and CCP 1013. Service by mail on November 21, 2018 did not provide 5 additional days for mailing. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOEL DROUET VS. JOHNNY HANSELL ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday December 17, 2018 line 3. DEFENDANT JOHNNY HANSELL DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges each element of each cause of action. Whether Plaintiff will be able to prove damages, retention of benefit, etc., is a factual issue that will be addressed at a later point. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 812 GUERRERO LLC VS. CLAUDIA TIRADO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday December 17, 2018 line 4. DEFENDANT CLAUDIA TIRADO DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained without leave to amend. Notice is fatally defective. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 812 GUERRERO LLC VS. CHRIS SIDERIS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday December 17, 2018 line 5. DEFENDANT CHRIS SIDERIS DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained without leave to amend. Notice is fatally defective. = (501/REQ)
